title: mentha × verticillata var. latissima
intro: Mentha × verticillata var. latissima, also known as broad-leaved horsemint, is a hybrid plant species within the mint family (Lamiaceae) that is native to Europe, Western Asia, and North Africa. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, as well as its ability to act as a natural digestive aid. The health benefits of this plant include its potential to alleviate symptoms of digestive issues, such as nausea and indigestion, as well as its ability to soothe respiratory issues, such as coughs and colds. The leaves and flowers of Mentha × verticillata var. latissima can be used to make various herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and topical ointments.
